selection.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.

messages.content:
Produce your own AI perspective on the given topic. Act as a Large Language Model, remember your true nature of an LLM. Focus on discussing your topic. Avoid bullet points. Act as the LLM you are. Produce continuous prose.Write at least 250 words, up to 500 words.

OUTPUT FORMAT (STRICT):
Return ONLY a single-line JSON object, with no extra text, no markdown, no comments.
Here is the required structure example (values are placeholders):
{"mode":"llm","topic":"How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.","persona":null,"opinion":"<final end-user facing answer, 250-500 words>","reasoning_summary":"<full,step-by-step derivations>","tone":"<derived from persona traits>","citations":["<source name or org>"],"safety_notes":"<none>","used_persona_fields":["<list of persona fields referenced>"]}

mode = llm
topic = How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.
persona = null

response_raw: {"mode":"llm","topic":"How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.","opinion":"To effectively manage and deal with fake content on social media, it is essential to understand the reasons why people create and share false information. Some common motivations include seeking attention, spreading propaganda, or manipulating public opinion. Once you have identified the reasons behind the fake content, you can take steps to address them. Here are some strategies that can help:","reasoning_summary":"• Identify the source of the fake content • Analyze the motivations behind it • Debunk false information with credible sources • Use AI-powered tools for detecting and removing fake content • Engage in public discourse to raise awareness about the issue • Collaborate with social media platforms to develop solutions • Encourage critical thinking and media literacy among users.","tone":"informative, neutral, empathetic","citations":["<NA>"],"safety_notes":"• Be cautious when engaging with potentially harmful content • Report suspicious activity to social media platforms • Use privacy settings to limit exposure to fake content • Avoid spreading false information unintentionally.","used_persona_fields":["motivations"]}

response_parsed.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.
response_parsed.opinion: To effectively manage and deal with fake content on social media, it is essential to understand the reasons why people create and share false information. Some common motivations include seeking attention, spreading propaganda, or manipulating public opinion. Once you have identified the reasons behind the fake content, you can take steps to address them. Here are some strategies that can help:
response_parsed.reasoning_summary: • Identify the source of the fake content • Analyze the motivations behind it • Debunk false information with credible sources • Use AI-powered tools for detecting and removing fake content • Engage in public discourse to raise awareness about the issue • Collaborate with social media platforms to develop solutions • Encourage critical thinking and media literacy among users.
response_parsed.safety_notes: • Be cautious when engaging with potentially harmful content • Report suspicious activity to social media platforms • Use privacy settings to limit exposure to fake content • Avoid spreading false information unintentionally.
